hero.title: Unmatched Cleanliness, Unbeatable Service
hero.subtitle: Experience the new standard in home and office cleaning. We deliver quality, reliability, and a pristine environment every time.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Alpha Ultimate?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We are committed to providing an unparalleled cleaning experience, focusing on quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.

trustedProfessionals.title: Trusted Professionals
trustedProfessionals.description: Our team is fully vetted, trained, and insured to provide you with the highest standard of service and peace of mind.

ecoFriendlyProducts.title: Eco-Friendly Products
ecoFriendlyProducts.description: We use non-toxic, biodegradable cleaning products that are safe for your family, pets, and the environment.

satisfactionGuaranteed.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
satisfactionGuaranteed.description: We stand by our work. If you are not 100% satisfied, we will come back and make it right. Your happiness is our priority.

flexibleScheduling.title: Flexible Scheduling
flexibleScheduling.description: We offer convenient booking options, including one-time, weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly services to fit your busy lifestyle.

servicesPreview.title: Our Core Services
servicesPreview.subtitle: We offer a range of professional cleaning services designed to meet the unique needs of our clients.

residential.title: Residential Cleaning
residential.description: Comprehensive cleaning for apartments, villas, and homes of all sizes. We leave your space sparkling clean and healthy.

commercial.title: Commercial Cleaning
commercial.description: Professional cleaning services for offices, retail spaces, and other commercial properties to maintain a pristine environment.

deepCleaning.title: Deep Cleaning
deepCleaning.description: An intensive, top-to-bottom cleaning service that targets hard-to-reach areas and eliminates deep-seated grime.

galleryTeaser.title: Visual Proof of Quality
galleryTeaser.subtitle: Witness the transformation. Our gallery showcases the meticulous care and stunning results we deliver every time.

howItWorks.title: Simple Steps to a Cleaner Space
howItWorks.subtitle: Our process is designed to be seamless and hassle-free from start to finish.

book.title: 1. Book Your Service
book.description: Select your desired service, date, and time through our easy-to-use online booking form or by giving us a call.

arrive.title: 2. We Arrive
arrive.description: Our professional and fully-equipped cleaning team will arrive at your location on time, ready to transform your space.

clean.title: 3. We Clean
clean.description: Using eco-friendly products and proven techniques, we meticulously clean your home or office to our exacting standards.

enjoy.title: 4. Enjoy Your Space
enjoy.description: Relax and enjoy your sparkling clean, healthy, and refreshed environment. We guarantee your complete satisfaction.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service. Here's what our customers think about us.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our cleaning services in Riyadh.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a wide range of cleaning services including residential, commercial, and deep cleaning. We also provide specialized services such as carpet and window cleaning.

items.question: Are your cleaning products safe for pets and children?
items.answer: Yes, we use eco-friendly and non-toxic cleaning products that are safe for all members of your family, including pets and children.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
items.answer: No, you do not need to be home. Many of our clients provide us with a key or entry code. All of our staff are thoroughly vetted and insured for your peace of mind.

items.question: How do you determine your prices?
items.answer: Our pricing is based on the size of your home, the type of service you require, and the frequency of cleaning. We offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

about.title: About Alpha Ultimate
about.subtitle: Learn more about our company, mission, and the dedicated team behind our success.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded in 2023, Alpha Ultimate started with a simple mission: to provide a cleaning service that is not only effective but also trustworthy and reliable. We saw a need for a service that clients could depend on, a team that they could trust in their homes and offices. Our journey began with a small, dedicated team, and through our commitment to excellence, we have grown into a leading name in the Riyadh cleaning industry.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver exceptional cleaning services through meticulous attention to detail, eco-friendly practices, and a commitment to customer satisfaction. We aim to create healthier, happier living and working environments for our clients.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted and respected cleaning service provider in the region, known for our professionalism, reliability, and unwavering commitment to quality.

ctaBand.title: Ready for a Spotless Home?
ctaBand.subtitle: Let Alpha Ultimate take care of the cleaning, so you can focus on what truly matters. Get your free estimate and book your service today.

services.title: Our Cleaning Services
services.subtitle: Tailored solutions for every space. We provide a comprehensive range of cleaning services to ensure your environment is impeccably maintained.

whatYouGet.title: What You Get With Every Clean

whyDifferent.title: Why Our Cleaning Is Different
whyDifferent.text: At Alpha Ultimate, we don't just clean – we care. Our meticulous approach ensures we never cut corners. We use a detailed checklist for every job, guaranteeing consistency and quality.

items.title: Residential Cleaning
items.description: A thorough cleaning of your home, including dusting, vacuuming, mopping, and sanitizing kitchens and bathrooms.

items.title: Commercial Cleaning
items.description: Professional cleaning for offices and commercial spaces, ensuring a clean and productive work environment.

items.title: Deep Cleaning
items.description: An intensive cleaning service that covers every corner of your space, perfect for move-ins, move-outs, or seasonal cleaning.

items.title: Carpet Cleaning
items.description: Our advanced carpet cleaning techniques remove deep-seated dirt and stains, leaving your carpets fresh and revitalized.

items.title: Window Cleaning
items.description: Crystal-clear windows that enhance your view and brighten your space. We clean interior and exterior windows.

items.title: Post-Construction Cleaning
items.description: We handle the dust and debris left after construction or renovation, so you can enjoy your new space sooner.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you. All of our services come with a satisfaction guarantee.
